title: Principal Frontend Developer at BEL Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at BEL Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
